definition:
1. delightsome, delightful, pleasant, agreeable, glad , (Theognis Elegiacus), etc.; τὸ τερπνόν delight, pleasure , (Thucydides); τὰ τερπνά delights, pleasures , (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. of persons, αὑτῷ τερπνός with joy  to himself, (Sophocles Tragicus):—;comparative and Sup. τερπνότερος, -ότατος, (Theognis Elegiacus); later, -ιστος:—;adverb τερπνῶς, (Theognis Elegiacus) (ML)
